zh.lifeSummary: 當John Holme II於1419年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾包爾 煙雨 古巴爾德時，他的父親John Holmes Sr16歲，母親Elizabeth Wastneys12歲。他於1441年與Jane Elleker在英國越可爾霍爾梅結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Holme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Holm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Thor, Holger, Nels, Nils, Sven, Helmer, Lennart, Niels, Vibeke.

English, Scottish, German, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived on an island, in particular a piece of slightly raised land lying in a fen or partly surrounded by streams, from Middle English, Middle Low German holm, Old Norse holmr, or else a habitational name from a place called with this element. The Swedish name is often ornamental.

English: topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, from Middle English holm, a divergent development of Old English hole(g)n ‘holly (tree)’; or, especially in southern England, a habitational name from any of the places such as East and West Holme (Dorset) or Holne (Devon). Compare Hollis .

variants.name: Holmes
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Holme II was born in 1419, in Paull with Thorngumbald, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Holmes Sr, was 16 and his mother, Elizabeth Wastneys, was 12. He married Jane Elleker in 1441, in Holme, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1450, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

Il a épousé Jane Elleker en 1441, à Holme, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. ko.lifeSummary: John Holme II(이)가 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폴 위스 토른구볼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Holmes Sr(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wastneys(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1441년 영국 요르크실르 홀에서 Jane Elleker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Holme II родился в 1419 г. в местности поулл вит таурнгумбалд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Holmes Sr было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wastneys, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Elleker в 1441 г. в местности холм, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
